user.title: Amazon Order Tracker
user.description: Connect to Gmail over IMAP and scan Amazon order emails. The password below is NOT your normal Google password. Use a Google App Password created from your Google Account security settings. Also make sure IMAP is enabled in Gmail under Settings > See all settings > Forwarding and POP/IMAP.

data.name: Name
data.lookback_days: Days of email history to scan

data_description.password: Do not enter your regular Google password. Enter a 16-character Google App Password. Create one from your Google Account security settings after enabling 2-Step Verification.

error.cannot_connect: E001: Could not reach the IMAP server. Check the server name, port, and network access.
error.invalid_auth: E002: Gmail rejected the login. Use your Gmail address and a Google App Password, not your normal Google password.
error.mailbox_not_found: E003: Login worked, but that mailbox/folder could not be opened.

abort.already_configured: This Gmail account is already configured.

init.title: Amazon Order Tracker Options
init.description: Edit runtime settings for this Amazon Order Tracker entry. Leave App password blank to keep the currently saved password. Set a one-time scan reset date only if you want the next successful scan to start from a specific day.

data.lookback_days: Days of email history to scan
data.stale_active_days: Days before stale active orders archive

data_description.password: Leave blank to keep the currently saved app password. Enter a new Google App Password only when you want to replace it.
data_description.scan_overlap_hours: When a checkpoint exists, the next scan starts this many hours before the checkpoint to avoid missing late-arriving email updates.
data_description.stale_active_days: Active orders with no updates for this many days are archived as stale.
data_description.reset_scan_from: Optional. Use YYYY-MM-DD. The integration clears this after the next successful scan.

reset_scan_checkpoint.name: Reset scan checkpoint
reset_scan_checkpoint.description: Clear only the saved scan checkpoint for one Amazon Order Tracker entry. Stored orders and seen message data are preserved.

config_entry.name: Config entry
config_entry.description: The Amazon Order Tracker entry to reset.

rebuild_order_state.name: Rebuild order state
rebuild_order_state.description: Clear stored orders, seen message tracking, unknown diagnostics, and the scan checkpoint for one Amazon Order Tracker entry.

config_entry.name: Config entry
config_entry.description: The Amazon Order Tracker entry to rebuild.
